nasb.text: Then the priest shall present them before the Lord and shall offer his sin offering and his burnt offering.

esv.text: And the priest shall bring them before the Lord and offer his sin offering and his burnt offering,

cnv.text: 祭司要在耶和華面前獻上這些供物，又要獻上他的贖罪祭和燔祭；

ccb.text: 祭司要把这些祭物带到耶和华面前，为他献上赎罪祭和燔祭，
